challenge.title: Korak 7
challenge.description:
Trenutno, currentContent je inicijalizovan vrednošću praznog niza karaktera. Ali željeni rezultat bi bio da currentContent sadrži vrednost teksta trenutne beleške.

U ranijoj lekciji, naučili ste kako da radite sa događajem DOMContentLoaded na ovaj način:

window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  // Do stuff here
});

Kada je sve u HTML dokumentu učitano i parsirano, moći ćete da sigurno pristupite noteEl.

Počnite dodeljivanjem metode addEventListener objektu window. Prvi argument za metodu addEventListener treba da bude događaj "DOMContentLoaded". Drugi argument bi trebalo da bude strelica funkcija. Unutar tela strelice funkcije, dodelite vrednost noteEl.textContent na currentContent.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Click or tap on the card to edit your note.

Many languages have words that carry meanings so specific or culturally rooted that they can't be neatly translated into English. One example is the Japanese word "tsundoku", which refers to the habit of acquiring books and letting them pile up unread, something many book lovers can relate to. Another is the Portuguese word "saudade", describing a deep, bittersweet longing for something or someone that is absent. Meanwhile, the French word "Dépaysement" captures the disorienting yet exciting feeling of being in a new place, far from home. These unique words remind us that language is more than vocabulary: it's a window into the values, habits, and emotions of the cultures that create it.

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: You should attach an addEventListener method to the window object.
Your event listener should listen for the "DOMContentLoaded" event.
Inside the body of the arrow function, assign the value of noteEl.textContent to currentContent.
